note: Requires choice mechanic not fully represented in standard DSL. Suggest: either two separate conditional effects based on opponent choice state, or extended DSL with 'choice' field: [{'trigger':'OnPlay','choice':{'prompt':'Choose one:','options':[{'description':'Trash 1 from opponent Life','actions':[{'type':'TrashOpponentLife','count':1}]},{'description':'Add 1 from your deck to your Life','actions':[{'type':'AddDeckToLife','count':1}]}]}}]
